question.label: Context gaps
question.name: What context are you still missing before you make bigger calls, Riley?
question.description: Finds the places where he may be filling in gaps from docs instead of team norms.

answer: I am trying not to interrupt people, so sometimes I keep questions in a notes doc instead of asking.

assessment.note: He is withholding questions to avoid interrupting people, which is a strong clarity blocker and suggests he lacks a safe path to ask for context.

new_queue.label: Notes doc habit
new_queue.name: That notes doc habit — what makes it hard to ask in the moment?

new_queue.label: Team contact
new_queue.name: Who have you had the most useful direct contact with so far, Riley?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would be most useful from me over the next couple of weeks, Riley?

new_queue.label: Next-step landing
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what should we tighten up before our next check-in?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 4)

history.answer_excerpt: I am comfortable reading the services, but I am less sure how decisions are really made here.
I can trace most request paths now, though I still miss historical context behind certain tradeoffs.
I have not been fully clear on who is on point for each domain when priorities conflict.
I am trying not to interrupt people, so sometimes I keep questions in a notes doc instead of asking.
